doc_content.summary: stark-extract-docs utilizes a sophisticated two-pass architecture to extract durable knowledge from transient development artifacts (specs, plans, reviews) and route them into permanent project documentation. Running entirely within the current session, it enforces a structural intermediate JSON layer to ensure deterministic formatting and routing of ADRs, retrospectives, and reference documents while employing hashing to prevent redundant executions.
key_features: Two-pass extraction decoupling LLM structuring (JSON) from deterministic markdown generation
SHA-256 hash-based skip logic comparing input artifacts against local historical execution records
Automatic multi-artifact discovery mapping specs to their corresponding plans and review files
Smart routing of 8 distinct extraction categories into 5 different documentation types
Batch execution mode with automated cross-spec ADR deduplication
Automated local Git commits and missing directory provisioning

alt_text: Architecture diagram and data flow visualization for the stark-extract-docs skill, detailing the two-pass process from raw artifacts to structured intermediate JSON, through the routing engine, and into generated Markdown documents with corresponding skip logic and state persistence.
